channel.title: Sample on Jibril Idris Profile

item.title: AI’s Power Outpaces Its Principles
item.description:
Paragraph

Xerum, quo qui aut unt expliquam qui dolut labo. Aque venitatiusda cum, voluptionse latur sitiae dolessi aut parist aut dollo enim qui voluptate ma dolestendit peritin re plis aut quas inctum laceat est volestemque commosa as cus endigna tectur, offic to cor sequas etum rerum idem sintibus eiur? item.title: When Anonymous Isn’t Really Anonymous
item.description:
Introduction

The Ethics of Data science is ultimately about addressing one important but simple question which is “What is the right thing to do with data?” The week’s lessons emphasized how ethical decision making requires more than technical skill. It demands awareness of privacy risks, transparency gaps, bias, accountability, and the unintended consequences that emerge when data systems are poorly designed. A seemingly harmless course evaluation survey provides a perfect case study. Students are asked to log in with their organizational credentials, complete a 10 question survey, and trust that their responses will remain anonymous. Executive management wants to use the results to determine which courses need redesign or improvement. As the data analyst assigned to this task, i must navigate the ethical tensions engrained in the survey’s design and the expectations placed on me. This blog analyzes the ethical issues in the survey, explores additional risks, provides recommendations to leadership, and outlines how to proceed ethically even if your concerns are dismissed.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description:
Hugo ships with several Embedded Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

X Simple Shortcode

{{< x user="GoHugoIO" id="1315233626070503424" >}}

Profile is a customizable single-page portfolio theme for Hugo featuring a contact form and blog. Made by @gurusabarishh.https://t.co/KwYcwfdy16

— GoHugo.io (@GoHugoIO) October 11, 2020

Vimeo Simple Shortcode

{{< vimeo 146022717 >}}


Youtube Simple Shortcode

{{< youtube w7Ft2ymGmfc >}}


Theme Custom Shortcodes

These shortcodes are not Hugo built-ins, but are provided by the theme.
